brands.name: Amazon
brands.collaborationStyle: affiliate-heavy, product placement, seasonal campaigns
brands.notes: Primarily drives affiliate / Amazon Associates deals; direct sponsorships reserved for macro+

brands.name: Notion
brands.collaborationStyle: integration demo, tutorial, workflow showcase
brands.notes: Extremely active sponsorship program; creator-friendly with good rep responsiveness

brands.name: Skylight Calendar
brands.collaborationStyle: family/home integration, routine showcase
brands.notes: Smart home family product — great fit for daily routine / family lifestyle creators

brands.name: Nike
brands.collaborationStyle: performance-driven, campaign-based, ambassador
brands.notes: Highly selective; prioritizes athletes and high-production fitness creators

brands.name: MyProtein
brands.collaborationStyle: discount code, product gifting, affiliate
brands.notes: Very active sponsor in fitness space; known for generous affiliate commissions

brands.name: Whoop
brands.collaborationStyle: review, data-driven storytelling, lifestyle integration
brands.notes: Rising wearable brand — great for creators who blend fitness with tech/optimization content

brands.name: L'Oréal
brands.collaborationStyle: product launch, tutorial integration, ambassador
brands.notes: Strong creator program across all sub-brands (Maybelline, NYX, Garnier, etc.)

brands.name: GRWM Cosmetics
brands.collaborationStyle: get-ready-with-me integration, haul, review
brands.brandPersonality: trendy, Gen Z, fun, affordable, social-first
brands.notes: Born on YouTube/TikTok — actively seeks creator partnerships as core marketing strategy

brands.name: Soft Services
brands.collaborationStyle: skincare routine, ingredient deep-dive, honest review
brands.notes: Niche skincare brand with cult following; prioritizes authenticity over reach

brands.name: HelloFresh
brands.collaborationStyle: meal unboxing, recipe integration, discount code
brands.notes: One of the most prolific YouTube sponsors ever; wide creator range accepted

brands.name: Made In Cookware
brands.collaborationStyle: recipe showcase, product review, kitchen tour
brands.notes: Rapidly growing DTC cookware brand with active creator program

brands.name: Brightland
brands.collaborationStyle: ingredient spotlight, cooking integration, aesthetic unboxing
brands.notes: Premium olive oil / vinegar brand; ideal for food creators with aesthetic / slow-living angle

brands.name: Samsung
brands.collaborationStyle: product launch, device review, campaign integration
brands.notes: Reserved for large channels; typically goes through agency intermediaries

brands.name: Anker
brands.collaborationStyle: product review, unboxing, setup/desk tour integration
brands.notes: Extremely creator-friendly; one of the most accessible mid-tier tech sponsors

brands.name: Ugreen
brands.collaborationStyle: setup tour, cable/hub review, desk organization
brands.notes: Aggressively sponsoring tech/setup creators; fast approval, competitive rates

brands.name: Fidelity
brands.collaborationStyle: educational integration, sponsored segment, brand awareness
brands.notes: Heavily regulated — requires compliance review; CPM is high but process is slower

brands.name: Monarch Money
brands.collaborationStyle: budgeting tutorial, app walkthrough, personal finance story
brands.notes: Fast-growing Mint alternative; actively seeking finance and lifestyle creator partners

brands.name: Blossom
brands.collaborationStyle: investing explainer, app review, beginner finance tutorial
brands.notes: Stock market social app targeting Gen Z investors; high CPM for small niche audiences

brands.name: Razer
brands.collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, esports integration
brands.notes: Strong creator program; brand recognition does a lot of the selling for you

brands.name: GFuel
brands.collaborationStyle: drink integration, custom flavor collab, discount code
brands.notes: Iconic gaming energy drink; one of the most widely distributed gaming sponsorships

brands.name: Backbone
brands.collaborationStyle: mobile gaming review, controller showcase, travel gaming
brands.notes: Mobile game controller brand growing rapidly; good fit for console + mobile crossover creators

brands.name: Booking.com
brands.collaborationStyle: accommodation integration, travel vlog, affiliate link
brands.notes: One of the most widely-used travel sponsors; accessible to creators of all sizes

brands.name: Heymondo Travel Insurance
brands.collaborationStyle: travel safety story, sponsored segment, affiliate
brands.notes: Aggressively sponsoring travel creators; good commission rates for affiliates

brands.name: Ekster Wallets
brands.collaborationStyle: travel gear review, minimalist packing, everyday carry
brands.notes: Smart wallet brand; ideal for minimalist travel creators or everyday carry content

brands.name: Skillshare
brands.collaborationStyle: class recommendation, sponsored segment, affiliate trial
brands.notes: Bread-and-butter YouTube sponsor; very high acceptance rate for educational creators

brands.name: Brilliant
brands.collaborationStyle: problem-solving demo, STEM integration, trial offer
brands.notes: STEM-focused learning platform; particularly strong fit for math, science, and logic creators

brands.name: Readwise
brands.collaborationStyle: reading habit content, note-taking workflow, book summary
brands.notes: Cult reading/highlighting tool; ideal for book review or PKM (personal knowledge management) creators

brands.name: Honey (PayPal)
brands.collaborationStyle: mid-roll segment, savings story, challenge integration
brands.notes: Legendary YouTube sponsor — almost universally recognizable; wide creator range

brands.name: Ridge Wallet

brands.notes: Extremely prolific YouTube sponsor; fits almost any male-skewing entertainment creator

brands.name: Established Titles
